title: andryala integrifolia var. arenaria
intro: Andryala integrifolia var. arenaria, also known as Alpine Rock Rose or Andryala arenaria, is a plant species within the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Andryala integrifolia var. arenaria are attributed to its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Andryala integrifolia var. arenaria are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
